summary: Test run: cosmic web simulation, sky map visualization, and cellular-automaton galaxy patterns.
A minimal GPT trained from scratch on Shakespeare, exploring what it takes to build language models from first principles.
A minimal durable execution engine in Python with SQLite, plus token compression and vector search — all built from first principles.
Terminal generative art: aurora borealis animation, Lichtenberg discharge patterns, and synthetic ocean waves — inspired by IOCCC 2025 winners
